overview: Functional medicine practice led by Dr. Peter Kozlowski, MD, with expertise in gut health, hormones, immune balance, and root-cause analysis. Offers both in-person and telemedicine consultations.
highlights: Functional medicine specialist in gut health, hormones, and genomics
Creator of Root Cause Practice Pro (RCPP), AI-powered functional medicine platform
targetAudience: Patients seeking functional medicine approaches to chronic health conditions, hormone balance, and root-cause optimization.
